Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumnMatrixSolver

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumnMatrixSolver
public class DistillationColumnMatrixSolver extends Object
Matrix inside-out warm-start solver for distillation columns.

The solver uses cached K-values and cached temperature derivatives to build one tridiagonal component-balance system per component. The tridiagonal systems update liquid component traffic, vapor traffic follows from cached equilibrium ratios, and tray temperatures are corrected with a Newton step on the bubble-sum residual. No rigorous flash is performed inside this solver; callers should finish with a rigorous column solver before accepting final products.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    MIN_DLN_K_DT
    Smallest usable derivative of ln(K) with respect to temperature.

  • Constructor Details

    • DistillationColumnMatrixSolver

      public DistillationColumnMatrixSolver(DistillationColumn column)
      Construct a matrix inside-out solver for a column.
      Parameters:
      column - column to warm start

  • Method Details

    • setMaxIterations

      public void setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Set the maximum number of matrix iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - maximum iterations; values below one are clamped to one

    • setTolerance

      public void setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Set the matrix-stage temperature residual target.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - average tray-temperature residual target in Kelvin

    • setDampingFactor

      public void setDampingFactor(double dampingFactor)
      Set the matrix-stage damping factor.
      Parameters:
      dampingFactor - damping factor between 0.05 and 0.9

    • getLastIterationCount

      public int getLastIterationCount()
      Get the iteration count from the latest matrix solve.
      Returns:
      matrix iteration count

    • getLastTemperatureResidual

      public double getLastTemperatureResidual()
      Get the latest matrix-stage temperature residual.
      Returns:
      average tray-temperature residual in Kelvin

    • getLastSolveTimeSeconds

      public double getLastSolveTimeSeconds()
      Get the latest matrix-stage wall time.
      Returns:
      solve time in seconds

    • hasConverged

      public boolean hasConverged()
      Check whether the latest matrix stage reached its residual target.
      Returns:
      true if the matrix residual target was reached

    • solve

      public boolean solve(UUID id)
      Run matrix inside-out iterations and update tray traffic estimates.
      Parameters:
      id - calculation identifier assigned to generated outlet streams
      Returns:
      true when the matrix state is finite and suitable as a warm start

    • resetResultMetrics

      private void resetResultMetrics()
      Reset metrics from the previous matrix solve.

    • initialise

      private boolean initialise()
      Initialise dimensions, caches, and external feed terms.
      Returns:
      true if matrix arrays could be initialised

      Find a tray thermodynamic system with component definitions.
      Returns:
      reference thermodynamic system, or null if none exists

      private void cacheFeedTerms()
      Cache all external feed terms used by the component-balance equations.

      private void updatePhaseIndices()
      Update phase-index caches for all trays.

    • updateKValueCache

      private void updateKValueCache()
      Update cached K-values and ln(K)-temperature derivatives from current tray states.

    • solveComponentBalances

      private double[][] solveComponentBalances()
      Solve component material balances for all components.
      Returns:
      liquid component flows indexed by tray and component, or null if singular

    • buildComponentBalance

      private void buildComponentBalance(int componentIndex, double[] vaporFlows, double[] liquidFlows)
      Build one component balance tridiagonal system.
      Parameters:
      componentIndex - component index
      vaporFlows - vapor traffic by tray
      liquidFlows - liquid traffic by tray

    • solveTridiagonalSystem

      private boolean solveTridiagonalSystem()
      Solve the current tridiagonal system using the Thomas algorithm.
      Returns:
      true if the system was solved with finite pivots

    • updateColumnState

      private double updateColumnState(double[][] liquidComponentFlows, UUID id)
      Update tray compositions, cached outlet streams, and temperatures from matrix flows.
      Parameters:
      liquidComponentFlows - matrix liquid component flows
      id - calculation identifier assigned to generated outlet streams
      Returns:
      average tray-temperature residual in Kelvin

    • calculateVaporComponentFlows

      private double[][] calculateVaporComponentFlows(double[][] liquidComponentFlows)
      Calculate vapor component flows from cached stripping factors.
      Parameters:
      liquidComponentFlows - liquid component flows indexed by tray and component
      Returns:
      vapor component flows indexed by tray and component

    • estimateUpdatedTemperature

      private double estimateUpdatedTemperature(int trayIndex, double oldTemperature, double[] liquidComponentFlows)
      Estimate a tray temperature update from the cached K-value derivative model.
      Parameters:
      trayIndex - tray index
      oldTemperature - current tray temperature in Kelvin
      liquidComponentFlows - liquid component flows on the tray
      Returns:
      updated tray temperature in Kelvin

    • updateTraySystemComposition

      private void updateTraySystemComposition(SystemInterface system, int trayIndex, double[] liquidComponentFlows, double[] vaporComponentFlows)
      Update the tray thermodynamic system composition for diagnostics and later K-cache updates.
      Parameters:
      system - tray thermodynamic system
      trayIndex - tray index
      liquidComponentFlows - liquid component flows
      vaporComponentFlows - vapor component flows

    • setPhaseComponent

      private void setPhaseComponent(SystemInterface system, int phaseIndex, int componentIndex, double componentFlow, double phaseFlow)
      Set one component amount and mole fraction in a phase.
      Parameters:
      system - thermodynamic system
      phaseIndex - phase index
      componentIndex - component index
      componentFlow - component flow assigned to the phase
      phaseFlow - total phase flow

    • createOutletStream

      private StreamInterface createOutletStream(SystemInterface template, int phaseIndex, double[] componentFlows, UUID id)
      Create an outlet stream from a component-flow vector.
      Parameters:
      template - tray system used as a thermodynamic template
      phaseIndex - preferred phase index in the template
      componentFlows - component flows assigned to the outlet
      id - calculation identifier assigned to the stream
      Returns:
      outlet stream for the matrix-updated phase

    • createOutletSystemTemplate

      private SystemInterface createOutletSystemTemplate(SystemInterface template, int phaseIndex)
      Create a single-phase outlet template from a tray phase when possible.
      Parameters:
      template - tray thermodynamic system
      phaseIndex - preferred phase index
      Returns:
      cloned outlet thermodynamic system

    • updateColumnProducts

      private void updateColumnProducts(UUID id)
      Update public column product streams after a matrix stage.
      Parameters:
      id - calculation identifier assigned to the products

    • readKValue

      private double readKValue(SystemInterface system, int trayIndex, int componentIndex, double fallbackValue)
      Read a K-value from the tray state, falling back to previous cached values when necessary.
      Parameters:
      system - tray thermodynamic system
      trayIndex - tray index
      componentIndex - component index
      fallbackValue - fallback K-value
      Returns:
      bounded K-value

    • estimateKDerivative

      private double estimateKDerivative(double kValue)
      Estimate a default K-value derivative for a component.
      Parameters:
      kValue - current K-value
      Returns:
      derivative of ln(K) with respect to temperature

      private double getStrippingFactor(int trayIndex, int componentIndex, double[] vaporFlows, double[] liquidFlows)
      Calculate a stripping factor for a component on a tray.
      Parameters:
      trayIndex - tray index
      componentIndex - component index
      vaporFlows - vapor traffic by tray
      liquidFlows - liquid traffic by tray
      Returns:
      stripping factor K V/L

      phaseTypeName - phase type name to find
      Returns:
      phase index, or -1 if absent

      liquid phase index, or -1 if absent

      Adapt the damping factor based on residual progress.
      Parameters:
      residual - current residual
      previousResidual - previous residual

      private boolean isUsablePivot(double pivot)
      Check whether a tridiagonal pivot is usable.

      pivot - candidate pivot
      Returns:
      true if the pivot is finite and nonzero

      private double boundKValue(double kValue)
      Bound a K-value to finite positive limits.

      kValue - candidate K-value
      Returns:
      bounded K-value

      private double blend(double newValue, double oldValue, double weight)
      Blend a new value with an old value.

      oldValue - old value
      weight - weight on the new value
      Returns:

      Returns:
